verifier.rationale: All eight official service-start rows were independently checked for exact block hashes and realized dates, exhaustive ordered cell partitions, lifecycle semantics, unique pinned true-route anchors, treatment cardinality and family normalization, referenced-route context isolation, Q89 status safety, collision-free identities, and an exact 62-row accepted-journal conversion. Fresh strict expansion is byte-identical to this artifact.

rationale: Eight exact official MTA rows establish realized service-start dates, one uniquely anchored current route per row, and fifteen bounded treatment members. Q14, Q51, Q115, and QM65 are atomic service-pattern occurrences. Q61, Q80, Q82, and Q89 are reviewed route-redesign bundles whose analysis family is supported by the official Queens Bus Network Redesign project context. Every predecessor, replacement, and alternative route reference remains treatment text or rider context only; only Q14, Q51, Q61, Q80, Q82, Q89, Q115, and QM65 receive affects_route relations.

payload.description: New Q14 service started June 29, 2025.
